{ "name": "php-http/httplug", "description": "HTTPlug, the HTTP client abstraction for PHP", "keywords": [ "http", "client" ], "homepage": "http://httplug.io", "license": "MIT", "authors": [ { "name": "Eric GELOEN", "email": "geloen.eric@gmail.com" }, { "name": "Márk Sági-Kazár", "email": "mark.sagikazar@gmail.com", "homepage": "https://sagikazarmark.hu" } ], "require": { "php": "^7.1 || ^8.0", "php-http/promise": "^1.1", "psr/http-client": "^1.0", "psr/http-message": "^1.0 || ^2.0" }, "require-dev": { "friends-of-phpspec/phpspec-code-coverage": "^4.1 || ^5.0 || ^6.0", "phpspec/phpspec": "^5.1 || ^6.0 || ^7.0" }, "autoload": { "psr-4": { "Http\\Client\\": "src/" } }, "scripts": { "test": "vendor/bin/phpspec run", "test-ci": "vendor/bin/phpspec run -c phpspec.ci.yml" } }
